rationale: The most relevant development for Poland is the continued uncertainty around the US-Iran deal, which affects energy prices indirectly; Israel's strikes on Beirut add instability but no direct Polish impact.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran and schedule cast doubt
top_events.summary: Conflicting signals on a US-Iran nuclear/sanctions deal keep energy markets uncertain. If a deal materializes, lower oil/gas prices could ease Poland's cost of living; continued uncertainty maintains current pressure.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut as Iran deal talks continue
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Beirut on the same day as supposed Iran deal signing add geopolitical volatility to the Middle East, indirectly threatening energy price stability relevant to Polish households.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: A Russian shadow fleet tanker seized by UK forces signals tightening enforcement of sanctions relevant to Poland's energy security posture and Russia containment efforts.
